title: Addie's Vanilla Client Mods
description: This is all the client side mods I use to give myself a better experience when it comes to building and datapack making.
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ea29f76efd1d15edc6db080e03f4d47e7f48cf4.png)

This includes all the mods i use on a daily basis. From perfomance mods to quality of life mods, this has it all. Together they inhance the vanilla experiance (especially when it comes to building in creative).

---------

### Credit to all the people who made the mods in this modpack, they are all truly amazing and i would struggle making the stuff i make a lot more without them

--------------

# FAQ

### Will this be on forge?

- Nope i use fabric for pretty much everything and i barely play forge.

### How much ram should i dedicate when using the pack?

- At least 3gb of ram.

### When will this be on ... minecraft version?

- Updates will only come to newer versions of the game, and will be released when i move to that version.

### When will updates come out?

- When mods update or when an old mod i used gets updated.

### Can i get .... mod added?

- If you make a suggestion on my discord server i will check out the mod (make sure that they are client side only).

### I only want to use a few mods in this pack?

- On the version page if you look at the 'Dependencies' section, all the mods in the pack will be listed.

### Will updates be made to older pack versions?

- No, once i move to a different minecraft version the pack for the previous version will be discontinued.

-------------
  ## WARNING!
 - When making a server with essentials mod it may ask your friends to install some mods if they dont have them (this is the only issue i have found)
